notes: Greenfield — package.json lands in SS-01 (project bootstrap). Build/test/lint/typecheck commands above will become live after SS-01 commits.
ESLint rules: fetch() and console.* are banned outside src/services/Logger.ts.
Static imports of @mozilla/readability and linkedom are banned (must be dynamic) — these libs are lazy-loaded.
Tailwind major version (3 vs 4) decided at SS-01; default in the spec is v3 with prefix='smd-'. Update this field if v4 is chosen.
Bundle size CI gate: main.js ≤1.5MB minified, ≤400KB gzipped, enforced via scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs.

infrastructure._note: Not applicable — StrataMD is an Obsidian community plugin that runs inside the user's local Obsidian app. Storage is plugin-local (data.json + IndexedDB); no server, no remote DB, no API keys, no environment variables.

dev_env_prerequisites.name: Node.js LTS
dev_env_prerequisites.description: Node.js 20+ required to run npm install / build / tests.
dev_env_prerequisites.check_command: node --version | grep -qE 'v(20|22|24)' && echo 'PASS: Node LTS detected' || (echo 'FAIL: Node 20+ required' && exit 1)

dev_env_prerequisites.name: Obsidian (for smoke testing)
dev_env_prerequisites.description: Obsidian desktop app installed locally for manual smoke tests during SS-12 / SS-17.
dev_env_prerequisites.check_command: echo 'Obsidian presence is a manual check — verify the app is installed before running SS-12 visual smoke test.'
